response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale cloud infrastructure or distributed systems leadership; their work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with minimal evidence of cloud compute platform ownership or C++-centric system design, and no clear technical leadership in cloud/DevOps mentoring as required.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and domains
Proven experience in open-source infrastructure and DevOps tooling
Demonstrated mentorship through workshops and community contributions
concerns: Only minimal C++ exposure (LabWindows/CVI role), far below 8-year requirement
No evidence of cloud compute platform ownership or large-scale distributed systems leadership
Lacks documented experience in mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers or setting architectural standards
